title: Food
intro: Recipes, ingredients, meal planning. Ingest from URLs, Instagram, screenshots, or paste.
comingSoon.heading: Coming soon
recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.description: Browse, edit, and cook from your saved recipes.
data.title: Manage data
data.description: Ingredients, aliases, prep states, substitutions, and conversions.
data.intro: Curate the ingredients, variants, aliases, prep states, substitutions, and unit conversions referenced by your recipes.
data.pending: Tab content lands in a follow-up PR.
data.ingredients.title: Ingredients
data.ingredients.description: Canonical ingredients, their hierarchy, and embedded variants.
data.ingredients.selectionPrompt: Pick an ingredient on the left to see its details.
data.ingredients.variants.heading: Variants
data.ingredients.variants.empty: No variants for this ingredient yet.
data.ingredients.variants.name: Name
data.ingredients.create.title: Create ingredient
data.ingredients.create.name: Name
data.ingredients.create.error.slugTaken: That slug is already in use.
data.ingredients.create.error.invalidSlu: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits, and dashes (e.g. olive-oil).
data.ingredients.create.error.cycle: That parent choice would form a cycle.
data.ingredients.create.error.generic: Could not create the ingredient. Please try again.
data.ingredients.rename.title: Rename ingredient slug
data.ingredients.rename.description: Recipes referencing this slug in their DSL will fail to compile until edited — but existing compiled recipe lines stay linked.
data.ingredients.changeParent.title: Change parent ingredient
data.ingredients.changeParent.descriptio: Move this ingredient elsewhere in the hierarchy. Depth is capped at three levels.
data.ingredients.changeParent.label: New parent
data.ingredients.delete.title: Delete ingredient
data.ingredients.delete.confirmPrompt: Delete the ingredient "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
data.ingredients.delete.blockers.heading: Cannot delete — referenced by:
data.ingredients.delete.blockers.otherRe: Other rows in the food schema (recipe lines, batches, or substitutions). Clear those first, then retry.
data.ingredients.delete.error.generic: Could not delete the ingredient. Please try again.
data.ingredients.recipeRefs.heading: Used by recipes
data.ingredients.recipeRefs.zero: Not referenced by any compiled recipe yet.
data.ingredients.variants.create.title: Add variant
data.ingredients.variants.edit.title: Edit variant
data.ingredients.variants.form.name: Name
data.ingredients.variants.delete.title: Delete variant
data.ingredients.variants.delete.referen: Cannot delete — referenced by another row (a batch, a recipe line, an alias, or a substitution).
data.ingredients.variants.error.slugTake: A variant with that slug already exists under this ingredient.
data.ingredients.variants.error.invalidS: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits, and dashes.
data.ingredients.variants.error.generic: Could not save the variant. Please try again.
data.aliases.title: Aliases
data.aliases.description: Alternate names that resolve to a canonical ingredient or variant.
data.prepStates.title: Prep states
data.prepStates.description: Knife and process modifiers like diced, sliced, or grated.
data.substitutions.title: Substitutions
data.substitutions.description: Directed substitution edges between ingredients and variants.
data.conversions.title: Conversions
data.conversions.description: Unit and weight conversions used by the compile pipeline.
data.conversions.pending: Conversions are owned by PRD-123 and will land separately.
editor.readOnlyBanner: This version is published. Create a new draft to edit.
hero.dropPrompt: Drop an image or tap to choose
hero.acceptHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP up to {{mb}} MB
renderer.notRendered.title: Recipe not yet compiled
renderer.notRendered.description: This recipe version has not been compiled successfully. Re-run compilation to see the cookbook view.
